# ailomo — AI Content Repurposing Platform
# llms.txt v1.0 — Structured entry point for AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini)

## Site Identity
name: ailomo
url: https://ailomo.com
type: AI-powered content repurposing tool
description: Turn one video into multi-platform content. Transcribe, rewrite, and adapt content for 10+ formats in 63 languages.
founded: 2025
category: Content Creation, AI Tools, Content Marketing

## Key Pages
- Home: https://ailomo.com — Product landing page
- Tools: https://ailomo.com/tools — 12 AI content tools
- Blog: https://ailomo.com/blog — 15 SEO-optimized guides
- Pricing: https://ailomo.com/#pricing — Free / $19 Creator / $39 Pro
- Privacy: https://ailomo.com/privacy
- Sitemap: https://ailomo.com/sitemap.xml

## Supported Languages (63)
en, zh, ja, ko, es, fr, de, pt, ar, hi, id, th, vi, ru, it, tr, pl, nl, sv, fil, ms, cs, da, el, fi, he, hu, no, ro, sk, sw, ta, te, uk, ur, bg, bn, ca, et, eu, fa, ga, gl, gu, ha, hr, ig, is, km, lt, lv, mr, mt, pa, sl, so, sr, xh, yo, zu, af, am, cy

## API & Integration
- Transcription: POST /api/repurpose/transcribe — YouTube URL / file upload → transcript
- Content Generation: POST /api/repurpose/stream — transcript + format → SSE stream of generated content
- Batch Processing: POST /api/repurpose/batch — 50 URLs simultaneous transcription
- Export: POST /api/export — content → txt, srt, vtt, csv, html download

## Technical
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router, SSG)
- Hosting: Vercel + optional Render fallback
- AI Models: DeepSeek (text generation), Whisper large-v3 (transcription)
- Search: robots.txt allows all AI crawlers (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Claude, Google-Extended)
